fallback_facts.text_block: The ancient Romans used to clean and whiten their teeth using <yellow>human urine</yellow>. It was so valuable that they even established a <red>urine tax</red> on the public collections.

The computers on the <yellow>Voyager 1 spacecraft</yellow> possess only sixty-nine kilobytes of memory. That is hundreds of thousands of times less capacity than a <red>standard car key fob</red> today.

fallback_facts.text_block: Oxford University is actually older than the <yellow>Aztec Empire</yellow>. The school began teaching in ten ninety-six, whereas the Aztec civilization was founded in <red>fourteen twenty-eight</red>.
